text:
The Giant Three-headed Snake is an anime-only animal in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 2 (1999) 

Appearance

Like its namesake, it has three heads and thick red and purple lines across its entire body. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

A tour guide to the animal show held on Whale Island introduces the Giant Three-headed Snake and details that each head has an individual name: "A-chan", "B-chan", and "C-chan". Later, it's released by Gon from its cage. 

Translations around the World

References
